accessKeySecret.description: The name of the secret containing the Sysdig Agent Access Key

secureAPITokenSecret.description: The name of the secret containing the Sysdig Secure API Token

region.description: The region where the collector is located

run_command.description: The command to be executed by the cluster-shield

repository.description: The repository of the image to be used

tag.description: The tag of the image to be used

pullPolicy.description: The pull policy to be used

proxy.description: Define proxy information to be used

httpProxy.description: The value for the HTTP_PROXY env variable

httpsProxy.description: The value for the HTTPS_PROXY env variable

noProxy.description: The value for the NO_PROXY env variable

dnsPolicy.description: Define Cluster Shield Pods DNS Policy

env.description: Define additional environment variables to be used by the Cluster Shield

name.description: The name of the environment variable

value.description: The value of the environment variable

volumes.description: Define additional volumes to be used by the Cluster Shield

volumeMounts.description: Define additional volume mounts to be used by the Cluster Shield pods

mountPath.description: The path where the volume will be mounted

subPath.description: The subpath of the volume to mount

podDisruptionBudget.description: Define the Pod Disruption Budget for the Cluster Shield pods

create.description: Create a Pod Disruption Budget for the Cluster Shield pods

minAvailable.description: The minimum number of pods that must be available during voluntary disruptions

allOf.description: One between global.sysdig.region and cluster_shield.sysdig_endpoint.region must be set
One between global.sysdig.accessKeySecret,global.sysdig.accessKey and cluster_shield.sysdig_endpoint.access_key must be set
One between global.clusterConfig.name and cluster_shield.cluster_config.name must be set

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before the probe is initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

ActionTrigger.description: Controls functionality how this action can be triggered. `none` effectively turns off the action.

enabled.description: Specify if the Admission Control is enabled

excluded_namespaces.description: List of namespaces to exclude from the admission control feature

failure_policy.description: The policy to apply when an error occurs during validation

http_port.description: HTTP Server port used to expose the webhook web server.

timeout.description: The number of seconds for the request to time out

AdmissionControlSupplyChainImageCosign.description: Cosign-like initialization parameters for image signature enforcer

mirror.description: The URL of The Update Framework (TUF) server used for retrieving sigstore-compliant trust information. If not specified, the default public sigstore TUF url will be used.

root.description: The filepath or URL where an out-of-the-band copy of The Update Framework (TUF) root JSON file is available. In case a filepath is used, it can be made available through a custom volume mount pointing at a dedicated secret and/or configmap.

root_checksum.description: The checksum for The Update Framework (TUF) root JSON file. Checksum value should be in the format: <algorithm>:<value> where supported algorithms are: sha256 and sha512. If no algorithm is specified, sha256 will be used.

enabled.description: Specify if the audit feature is enabled

excluded_namespaces.description: List of namespaces to exclude from the audit feature

http_port.description: HTTP Server port used to expose the webhook web server.

method.description: The method used by the audit feature to ingest audit events

timeout.description: The number of seconds for the request to time out

webhook_rules.description: List of rules used to determine if a request should be audited

Cache.description: Configuration for the cluster shield cache

backend.description: Define the cache backend to use

CacheRedis.description: Configuration for the cluster shield redis cache

name.description: The name of the cluster. Make sure to set a unique value for all the clusters being inspected

tags.description: Tags you want to apply to the metadata sent to the Sysdig BE. They are used for instance as additional labels to the KSM metrics, with format `agent_tag_<tag_name>`

enabled.description: Specify if the scanning feature is enabled

filters.description: Filters to apply to the images to scan

max_file_size_bytes.description: Maximum size in bytes for a file to be analyzed

max_file_size_bytes_in_memory.description: Maximum size in bytes for a file to be analyzed in memory; file whose size is bigger than this are temporarily copied on to the filesystem

memory_optimized_k8s_mode.description: Enable memory-optimized access to Kubernetes API. Enabled by default, queries K8s using the Metadata API for all resources but Pods. Set this to false if you need to see the replicas counters, but it will require more memory.

parallel_files_analysis_count.description: Maximum number of files that are analyzed in parallel

platform_services_enabled.description: Specify if the platform services are enabled

registry_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificate when connecting to the registry

field.description: The field to run the filter against

value.description: The value to run the filter against

enabled.description: Retrieve in-use information from the backend and aggregate them on the scan results

integration_enabled.description: Share in-use information with the external integrations

ContainerVulnerabilityManagementTargetWo.description: The type of workload for which container vulnerability management should operate, either \"kubernetes\" or \"non_orchestrated_containers\".
Defines if Container Vulnerability Management should target kubernetes workloads and provides configurations on how the scan should be performed.

enabled.description: Enables Container Vulnerability Management for kubernetes workloads

image_source.description: Specifies where container images are obtained from for vulnerability scanning. When setting \"registry\", images are pulled directly from the configured remote container registries. With \"node\", images are retrieved from the Kubernetes cluster nodes by interacting with the local container runtimes, limiting scans to images that are currently present on the nodes.

ContainerVulnerabilityManagementTargetWo.description: Defines if Container Vulnerability Management should target non-orchestrated containers only, and provides configurations on how the scan should be performed

enabled.description: Enables Container Vulnerability Management for non-orchestrated containers workloads

ignore_init_failures.description: Instructs the Container Vulnerability Management feature to ignore errors on container scanning initialization and fallback on host-only scanning

admission_control.description: Configurations for the admission control feature

container_vulnerability_management.description: Configurations for the container vulnerability management feature

kubernetes_metadata.description: Configurations for the kubernetes metadata feature

enabled.description: Controls the enablement of Kube State Metrics generation

ca_cert_file.description: Path to the CA Certificate file

root_namespace.description: Root namespace to use for the kubernetes resources

tls_cert_file.description: Path to the TLS Certificate file

tls_private_key_file.description: Path to the TLS Private Key file

enabled.description: Controls the enablement of Kubernetes events collection

annotations_allowlist.description: List of Kubernetes annotations keys that will be sent to the Sysdig BE e.g. for generating KSM metrics. To include them, provide a list of resource names in their plural form and Kubernetes annotation keys you would like to allow for them. Annotation keys can contain wildcard character '*'. A single '*' can be provided per resource to allow any annotation. By default, no annotations are allowed for any resource.

propertyNames.description: The resource name in lowercase plural form

enabled.description: Specify if the Kubernetes Metadata feature is enabled

LogLevel.description: Minimum log severity to be reported in logs.

kube_state_metrics.description: Influences the behaviour of Kubernetes State metrics generation

enabled.description: Specify if the Network Security feature is enabled
Specify if the Posture feature is enabled

timeout.description: Global timeout for executing the actions, in seconds.

volume_snapshot_class.description: The VolumeSnapshotClass to use for creating Volume snapshots.

verify.description: Define if the client must verify the backend SSL certificate.

collector.description: Host and port to access Sysdig Collector endpoint

region.description: The region where the collector is located

secure_api_token.description: The API Token to access Sysdig Secure

monitoring_port.description: HTTP Server port used to expose healthcheck and prometheus metrics.
